questions.question:
Which is \( \text{NOT} \) true of charismatic leaders?



Verbal Aptitude: NIELIT 2023 Feb Scientist C | Section E | Question: 131
options: Charismatic leaders are focused on their personal needs.
Charismatic leaders are willing to take high personal risk.
Charismatic leaders have behavior that is unconventional.
questions.correct_answer: Charismatic leaders are focused on their personal needs.

questions.question:
Leadership is often associated more with



Verbal Aptitude: NIELIT 2023 Feb Scientist C | Section E | Question: 139

Person perception is :



Verbal Aptitude: NIELIT 2023 Feb Scientist C | Section E | Question: 143
options: The process of how we manage, experience, and adjust our emotions
The process by which we form impressions and process information about people
The process by which we adjust to different cultural situations
The process by which we learn cultural norms and standards of behaviour
questions.correct_answer: The process by which we form impressions and process information about people
